problem: How are long-term memories physically encoded in neural tissue?
mechanism: Vagus nerve stimulation modulating brain-gut axis
hypothesis: The key to How are long-term memories physically encoded in neural tissue? is Vagus nerve stimulation modulating brain-gut axis — specifically Vagus nerve stimulation — which would help 8,000,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: Optogenetic mouse model with 5 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
